early_childhood.name: Early Childhood (3-6 years)
early_childhood.description: Very simple, large shapes, chunky outlines for developing motor skills
prompts: [PLACEHOLDER] Add simple prompts here (e.g., 'a big happy sun')

middle_childhood.name: Middle Childhood (7-9 years)
middle_childhood.description: Moderate complexity with action and story elements
prompts: [PLACEHOLDER] Add moderate complexity prompts (e.g., 'a superhero flying over a city')
recommended_themes: Animals with personality (smiling dinosaur, dancing bear)

late_childhood.name: Late Childhood (10-12 years)
late_childhood.description: Detailed and intricate with creative concepts
prompts: [PLACEHOLDER] Add detailed prompts (e.g., 'an enchanted forest with magical creatures')
recommended_themes: Nature with detail (butterflies, flowers with intricate petals)

teen.name: Teen (12+ years)
teen.description: Complex and sophisticated with realistic details
prompts: [PLACEHOLDER] Add sophisticated prompts (e.g., 'an anime warrior in detailed armor')

settings.fallback_prompt: a creative and fun coloring page
